title: Snek's Improvements and Consistencies
description: Improves Minecraft's textures without drastically changing them and still keeping their default feel.
body:
Improves Minecraft's textures without drastically changing textures and still keeping the default feel.

 

This is achieved in multiple ways, such as:

 

### Accurate item icons.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d684a80058945b6dbed1747de39b3f937b9b9fbf.png)
 

 

### Consistent color palettes.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eadaf90f1b805e52797f1a28b0876be9c58c2266.png)




This is best seen with iron, all iron is the same color.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80a871415baf9747580fa3e97457643b3578494b.png)

 

 

### Logically animated textures.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f3bd272804ff4b758c2168c27c9ec50bc430b35.gif)



 

 

### Eating animations for all consumables.
![Eating Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/519de761ea8d3c8f11dca83ff1ace12adaf66e0f.gif)


 

 

### Hunger previews and painting previews.
![Hunger Previews](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af465530bc053e0c46ebc86dc90d85dffcda753.png)


 

 

And much much more!






Feedback and criticism is always welcome.
